---
title: "Roadmap"
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
### Work in Progress

This page is still under construction.

:::

## Work Packages

### Work Package 1 -- Multisource database development for flow control

#### Task 1.1 -- Generation of numerical and experimental flow data

#### Task 1.2 -- Development of estimators for real-time flow predictions

#### Task 1.3 -- Database integration and management

### Work Package 2 -- Defining a dynamically-constrained solution space

#### Task 2.1 -- Reduced the action space: perturbation identification and instability characterization

#### Task 2.2 -- Reduced the state-space: building reduced-order models

#### Task 2.3 -- Coupling stability analysis with machine learning

### Work Package 3 -- Generalizable control law leveraging secondary flow instabilities

#### Task 3.1 -- Design of interpretable control laws

#### Task 3.2 -- Development of adaptive control framework

## Deliverables

- [ ] ($t_0$ + 03) -- D0.1: *Project website and initial data management plan*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 06) -- D1.1: *Geometric definition of the curved models*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 18) -- D1.2: *Uncontroled database (experiments + LES)*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 18) -- D2.1: *Linear stability analysis (global resolvent)*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 20) -- D1.3: *First version of estimators for flow prediction*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 22) -- D2.2: *Initial reduced order models*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 24) -- D0.2: *Mid-term report*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 26) -- D2.3: *Physics-informed dictionnary for symbolic regression*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 48) -- D1.4: *Consolidated uncontroled database (data assimilation and stability)*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 42) -- D1.5: *Optimized controled database (experiments + LES)*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 42) -- D3.1: *ROM with embedded control effects*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 46) -- D3.2: *Data assimilation and reinforcement learning framework*
- [ ] ($t_0$ + 48) -- D0.3: *Final report and final data management plan*
